title: Arthur the King - Rotten Tomatoes Scores and Consensus
text: Arthur the King achieves a critical score (Tomatometer) of 70% based on 86 reviews, with an audience score (Popcornmeter) of 97% based on 1,000+ verified ratings. The critical consensus acknowledges the film's emotional appeal but notes it could benefit from subtlety. As one reviewer observed, it's hard to deny Arthur the King's ability to tug at the heartstrings, although it may have been more effective if it had taken a subtler approach. The audience reception is highly positive, with viewers responding to the film as a feel-good family entertainment. The consensus is that Arthur the King is a feel-good movie with enough excitement and heartwarming drama to entertain the whole family. The gap between critical and audience reception (70% vs 97%) indicates strong audience satisfaction despite mixed critical reviews. This suggests word-of-mouth potential could help the film achieve better box office performance over time despite its weak opening weekend.
